regulation_name: Act against Unjustifiable Premiums and Misleading Representations
summary: Performance and efficacy representations must be based on fact and must not exaggerate beyond substantiation.
review_guidance: TRIGGER: Performance stats, energy savings, or guaranteed results. ACTION: WARN — require test evidence or qualify wording. CHECK: Test standard (JIS), conditions, and typical results. ESCALATE IF: Exaggerated or absolute performance without basis.
